gist.headline: Daily README Refresh

gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) acting as a librarian or archivist, updating a giant pixelated book or notice board with new information.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, updating a glowing notice board with fresh pixelated text. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
